T0573.title: Model Hallucination
T0573.definition: A model output that appears plausible but is unsupported, incorrect, fabricated, or misleading.
T0573.description: Model Hallucination is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0573.usageExample: Assess Model Hallucination related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
